source_description: Add a new alert-crawler service to north-cloud that polls authoritative regional safety sources (first: Manitoba Harm Reduction Network at safersites.ca), normalizes results into a generic community_alert envelope, persists to a dedicated Elasticsearch index, and publishes lifecycle events (created/updated/rescinded) on a dedicated Redis pub/sub channel. Bypasses classifier and publisher routing (mirrors rfp-ingestor pattern). Scope field uses a hierarchical controlled vocabulary sourced from jonesrussell/indigenous-taxonomy (extension in-scope). First consumer: Minoo community pages.
